name: PCI PIN Security Requirements
description: PCI PIN Security Requirements — security requirements for the protection of cardholder PIN data. Companion to PCI DSS for organizations handling PINs.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.

license.notes: PCI SSC Read-Copy License; free download with click-through.

desired_end_state.notes: PCI PIN Security Requirements is publicly downloadable from pcisecuritystandards.org but only after click-through acceptance of PCI SSC's license terms, which prohibit redistribution. Bulk-mirroring the PDF into this public repo would violate those terms. Per CLAUDE.md the structured content (if extracted) belongs in the companion private repo. No public-side gap remains here once this stub is marked licensed.
